# Starla — AI Interview Coach

## What is Starla?
Starla is an AI-powered interview preparation platform designed for college students and new graduates. It provides realistic mock interviews with instant, detailed feedback on every answer.

## Key Features
- AI-generated interview questions tailored to specific companies and roles
- Real-time scoring on clarity, relevance, depth, and structure
- STAR method coaching for behavioral interview answers
- Company research that informs question generation
- Resume-aware question personalization
- Performance analytics and progress tracking across sessions
- General behavioral interview practice mode

## Who is Starla for?
- College students preparing for their first job interviews
- New graduates entering the job market
- Career changers practicing for interviews in a new field
- Anyone who wants to improve their interview skills with structured, AI-powered feedback

## How it works
1. Upload your resume and specify the target role/company
2. Starla researches the company and generates realistic interview questions
3. Practice answering questions in a conversational format
4. Receive detailed feedback with scores, strengths, and specific improvements
5. Track progress across multiple practice sessions

## Pricing
- Free: 3 practice sessions per month with basic feedback
- Pro ($12/month): Unlimited sessions, advanced analytics, resume-aware questions
- Career Center (custom): University-wide access for career services departments

## Content
Starla's blog covers interview preparation topics including the STAR method, behavioral interview questions, technical vs behavioral interviews, and practice strategies.

## Contact
Website: https://trystarla.com
Email: eli@starla-ai.com
